sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73292" key="o(lo/sfaltos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁλό-σφαλτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quite defective,</tr_> marg. gloss in cod. of <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.269</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
